text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sat May  3 08:47:18 2014
New Revision: 352873
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/352873
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r352873/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  
  PR:		ports/189226
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/net/p5-URI-OpenURL/Makefile

Modified: head/net/p5-URI-OpenURL/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net/p5-URI-OpenURL/Makefile	Sat May  3 08:47:13 2014	(r352872)
+++ head/net/p5-URI-OpenURL/Makefile	Sat May  3 08:47:18 2014	(r352873)
@@ -7,9 +7,12 @@ CATEGORIES=	net perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Parse and construct OpenURL's (NISO Z39.88-2004)
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-URI>=0:${PORTSDIR}/net/p5-URI
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
